foundation: Walk flat no visible cracks inside or out, pier & beam
description: Located in the heart of one of Fort Worth’s most desirable neighbor hoods, this all brick property currently features 2 bedrooms, 1 bath, 1320 sqft with a full sized two car garage. A second full bath could easily bed added and/or a third bedroom pushing the after repair value up to $600k (See comps in the google drive link). Property walks flat, no cracks inside or out. Original hardwood floors are in good shape and cover 70% of the home. Property will need a new roof, HVAC (ducts are already in place), electric panel and cosmetic updates. Properties in this neighborhood down the road from TCU don’t come up for sale often. Don’t miss out. If you have any questions please call/text JT 512-590-3843. One time showing,
